arts.sum: Como picked up their third win in their last four matches at home on Monday, as they defeated Udinese 4-1 in a crazy game with two red cards. Atalanta are now seven points off Napoli after losing to ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Como vs. Atalanta BC - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Como and Atalanta BC, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
